---
title: "任建超"
image: misc/info/photo.png
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: renjianchao@yzu.edu.cn
      href: mailto:renjianchao@yzu.edu.cn
    - icon: github
      text: 任建超
      href: https://jianchaoren.github.io/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Chi Zhang
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/chizapoth/
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Hello! 

I am a teacher at **Yangzhou University**(www.yzu.edu.cn), working on agricultural economic management.


:::
